articles.title: James Hagens watch begins as Bruins brace for top prospect’s potential arrival
articles.description:
Hagens closed out his sophomore season at Boston College with 47 points in 34 games.

The post James Hagens watch begins as Bruins brace for top prospect’s potential arrival appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Hagens finished his sophomore season at Boston College with 47 points in 34 games.
Bruins anticipate Hagens' potential arrival, enhancing their roster for the upcoming season.
Local fans may see Hagens contribute to the Bruins' performance in the NHL soon.
